untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of Fibonacci retracement levels applied to high-low range and identification of round/even price numbers. Neither Fibonacci retracement calculation (which requires dynamic high-low range application to current price) nor round-number detection logic are available in the allowed indicator list. The signal also references external validation ('New York Federal Reserve study confirms increase in trader activity around even numbers') which cannot be operationalized as a technical indicator condition.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_4 is a pattern recognition signal based on psychological/round-number price clustering theory. It requires: (1) calculation of Fibonacci ratios (0.618, 1.618, 0.382, 0.50, 1.382, 2.236, 2.618) applied to (high - low) added to low price, and (2) detection of when price approaches these dynamically-computed levels or round dollar amounts. The allowed indicator set does not include Fibonacci extension/retracement levels, round-number detection, or order flow microstructure indicators. Direction marked NEUTRAL because the signal indicates both resistance (stalling) without directional bias. Exit condition 'AUTHOR_SILENT' suggests no specific exit was defined.
